title: HeadyAPI — The Developer API for Heady™
description: Full programmatic access to the Heady™ AI ecosystem. REST + GraphQL, interactive playground, SDK libraries for JS/Python/Go, φ-scaled rate limiting, WebSocket streaming, and 15 production endpoints.
ogDescription: REST + GraphQL API with interactive playground, SDK libraries, and φ-scaled rate limiting. Full access to the Heady™ AI ecosystem in your code.
